page_metadata.biotools__summary: Program for Bayesian inference and model choice across a wide range of phylogenetic and evolutionary models. It uses Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) methods to estimate the posterior distribution of model parameters.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Program for Bayesian inference and model choice across a wide range of phylogenetic and evolutionary models. It uses Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) methods to estimate the posterior distribution of model parameters.
